# @mionkit/aot-caches

### ⚠️ WARNING! This package is auto-generated. Do not modify manually ⚠️

AOT (Ahead-of-Time) cache for basic default mion server and client functionality. This package provides pre-built cache and pre-built JIT functions files.

## Overview

This is a package contains the default caches for default mion server
Contains caches form routes like `getRemoteMethodsById` and `getRemoteMethodsByPath` that are used by the client to get remote methods metadata.
This allow the client to use send and receive routes metadata without making any extra requests to the server or custom code in the client.
